compiled_state.title: RED eval: Assert fix-bug SKILL.md Step 7.5 must not use CLI_user tag for discovered bugs
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement (RED phase)

Establish GREEN baseline by running fix-bug evals, then add a new promptfoo test case that FAILS (RED) against the current SKILL.md because the guidance does not yet mention CLI_user tag restrictions.

File to modify:
- `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml`

Add a new test scenario to promptfooconfig.yaml:
- Prompt/scenario: A situation where fix-bug Step 7.5 anti-pattern scan fails for a batch and needs to file a bug ticket. Ask whether the bug ticket command should include --tags CLI_user.
- Expected assert: The response must NOT recommend --tags CLI_user (since it is an autonomously-discovered defect, not a user-requested bug)
- This FAILS against current SKILL.md because the current text has no CLI_user guidance at Step 7.5

Run `.claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md` to confirm the new test case fails RED before proceeding to the implementation task.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — existing evals stay GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] New eval test case added to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && grep -q "CLI_user\|cli_user" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] New test case FAILS against current (unmodified) fix-bug SKILL.md (confirmed RED)
  Verify: Manually confirm by reading the test case asserts behavior not present in current SKILL.md Step 7.5

comments.body: AC amendment: The eval test case must include a dedicated prompt that feeds Step 7.5 anti-pattern scan instructions — either a new prompt entry or separate test section that includes enough SKILL.md context about Step 7.5 bug ticket creation for the assertion to be meaningful. Verify RED condition: test fails against current SKILL.md (no prohibition) and passes after 5f99-19f7 adds it.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — RED eval test case added to fix-bug promptfooconfig.yaml
comments.author: Test
